subject: npmx Weekly #16
headline: npmx Weekly #16
intro: Exciting developments are happening at npmx! Check out the latest updates that enhance user experience and community recognition.

topics.title: Version Release 0.11.0
topics.summary: This release introduces a package timeline page, progressive loading for organization packages, and UI improvements, enhancing user engagement and functionality.

topics.title: Fix for Sorting Desynchronization
topics.summary: A pull request was merged to ensure consistent sorting on organization pages, aligning with user expectations during navigation.

topics.title: npmx Growth Recognition
topics.summary: npmx.dev has been recognized as the fastest-growing emerging open source organization in Q1 2026, standing out as the only non-AI tool in the top 10.
